# JustBE Aesthetics

## About

JustBE Aesthetics is a physician-led wellness and aesthetics practice in
Dallas, Texas, founded and run solo by Dr. Adir Marchuk. The practice is
built on a nutrition-first, root-cause philosophy: every program starts
with understanding the body from the inside out (CBC panels, food
allergen testing, lifestyle assessment) before any treatment plan is
built. Every appointment — in-person or telehealth — is with Dr. Marchuk
directly. No nurse practitioner, no assembly line.

## Services and Pricing

- Nutrition & Lifestyle Coaching: starting at $250 per consultation,
  ongoing programs from $400/month
- Medical Weight Loss (physician-led, including GLP-1 / semaglutide
  protocols): starting at $350/month, lab work billed separately
- Peptide Therapy (custom protocols — BPC-157, CJC-1295/Ipamorelin,
  etc.): starting at $300/month
- Botox / Neurotoxin: $13–$16 per unit, typical treatments $200–$500
- Dermal Fillers (lips, cheeks, nasolabial folds): $650–$900 per
  syringe
- Telehealth Consultations: available for new and existing clients;
  pricing matches in-person

(Pricing ranges are typical for the Dallas market — confirm during
consultation.)

## Locations

- 6780 Abrams St, Suite 209–210, Dallas, TX 75231

## Contact

- Phone: (469) 804-7212
- Email: doctor@jbaesthetics.org
- Website: https://justbeaesthetics.com
- Hours: By appointment — Monday through Friday
- Telehealth: available nationwide where Dr. Marchuk is licensed

## Service Area

Dallas, Highland Park, University Park, Preston Hollow, Plano, Frisco,
Richardson, Addison, Farmers Branch, Carrollton, Irving, Garland,
Mesquite, Lakewood, Uptown Dallas, Oak Lawn, Lake Highlands, North
Dallas, and surrounding DFW metro. Telehealth patients served nationwide
where licensed.

## Key Facts

- 5+ years in practice
- 1,200+ clients supported
- 4.9 average client rating
- Solo practitioner: every visit is with Dr. Marchuk directly
- Trained in nutritional science before aesthetics
- Physician-led medical weight loss with lab-informed protocols
- Travels 7–10 days per month; telehealth fills those windows
- Accepts new patients (as of publication)

## What Makes Us Different

JustBE is not a medspa with rotating staff. It is a physician practice
where wellness and aesthetics share the same exam room. Dr. Marchuk
trained in nutritional science before aesthetics, so every program —
including Botox or filler appointments — begins with understanding the
client's biology, hormones, sleep, and lifestyle. Clients who book for
an aesthetic concern often stay for root-cause wellness work; clients
who start with nutrition often address aesthetic concerns with the same
physician who already knows their labs.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What does a first visit at JustBE cost?**
A first consultation is $250 and includes a full intake, review of any
existing labs, and a recommended next step. If lab work is ordered, it
is billed through the lab (usually $150–$400 depending on panels).

**How much does Botox cost at JustBE?**
Botox is priced per unit at $13–$16. A typical forehead/frown treatment
uses 20–40 units, so most treatments land between $260 and $640. Pricing
is confirmed at the consultation.

**Do you accept insurance?**
JustBE is a cash-pay practice. We provide itemized superbills that many
PPO plans reimburse for the medical (non-aesthetic) portions of care,
including nutrition counseling and weight-loss programs.

**Do you offer telehealth, and where?**
Yes. Telehealth is available for new and existing clients for
nutrition, medical weight loss, peptide therapy, labs review, and
follow-ups. Dr. Marchuk is licensed in Texas and expanding; confirm
your state at booking.

**How long until I see results from medical weight loss?**
Most clients on a GLP-1 / semaglutide protocol see 5–10% body weight
reduction in 3–4 months when combined with the nutrition program.
Timelines vary by starting point, labs, and adherence.

**What areas of Dallas do you serve?**
The in-person clinic is in North Dallas (75231), convenient to Highland
Park, University Park, Preston Hollow, Lake Highlands, and Uptown.
Telehealth patients are served anywhere Dr. Marchuk is licensed.

**Who will I see at my appointment?**
You always see Dr. Adir Marchuk directly — every appointment, every
time. There is no nurse practitioner, PA, or rotating provider.

**What makes JustBE different from a medspa?**
JustBE is physician-led and nutrition-first. Treatments begin with a
labs-and-lifestyle assessment rather than a menu of services. Aesthetic
procedures (Botox, fillers) are offered alongside root-cause medicine,
not separately from it.
